name: AIBOM: refuses to overwrite an existing AIBOM-<tag>.json without --force (SBOM for a release should be immutable)
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v0.3.0 --emit compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v0.3.0 --emit compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json
